text.title: Spring Boot Layered Architecture Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: skip-this-methodology — apply reactive patterns (WebTestClient + StepVerifier); blocking JPA is forbidden
upgrade to Boot 3 + jakarta.* imports first; do not adopt this methodology on Boot 2
accept Pageable, return Page<DTO>; never unbounded findAll
@Transactional on the service method; record DTO out via MapStruct
return record DTO; never the entity
skip-this-methodology — annotations differ; pattern translates conceptually but not literally

text.example: stack=webmvc_blocking → version=3.2 → shape=write (POST /users) → transactional-on-writes → @Transactional + MapStruct DTO + BCrypt hashing.
